name: io.github.davidmosiah/delx-living-body
description: Meta-MCP that auto-detects installed wellness connectors and composes them into one body data layer.

environmentVariables.name: DELX_LIVING_BODY_DETECT_TTL
environmentVariables.description: Detection cache TTL in seconds. Defaults to 60.

environmentVariables.name: DELX_LIVING_BODY_NO_CACHE
environmentVariables.description: Set to true/1/yes to disable the SQLite response cache.

environmentVariables.name: DELX_LIVING_BODY_NPM_RUNNER
environmentVariables.description: Override the npm runner binary used to spawn child connectors (default: npx).
